title: Policy Compliance Copilot
summary: Explain policy requirements, answer control questions, and provide compliance-friendly answer trails.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Policy Compliance Copilot is positioned as a RegTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Explain policy requirements, answer control questions, and provide compliance-friendly answer trails.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on compliance, copilot, policy.
